programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: On a cold day, few dishes are as comforting as a hearty soup—unless it turns out starchy or gluey. Watch as we make thick and creamy versions of two of our favorites: ham and split pea, and rustic potato-leek.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Our goal was simple: Rescue two favorite fancy vegetable dishes—twice-baked potatoes and stuffed bell peppers—from the clutches of cafeterias, bad steakhouses, and frozen food manufacturers.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Bistro classics, such as steak au poivre and crème brûlée, offer a taste of real French cooking without pretension. We show you how to create these dishes without spending all day in the kitchen.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: The test kitchen shows you how to make the perfect steakhouse dinner—salad with creamy blue cheese dressing and seared filet mignon.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We show you how to prepare fried rice and kung pao shrimp. Our findings of rice cookers and long-grain white rice guarantee perfect rice every time.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Simple yet interesting, both chicken Milanese and chicken piccata are reliable test kitchen favorites. We like to start them on the stovetop but finish the cooking in the oven

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: The test kitchen provides foolproof recipes for two classic pasta sauces: puttanesca and Bolognese.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Pasta with garlic and oil is perhaps the most famous quick pasta dish. It starts with ingredients on hand—garlic, good olive oil, hot red pepper flakes—and turns them into something special and uncommonly good.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We uncover the secrets to beef Burgundy at its best—and also show you a way to make portions of it ahead of time.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We traveled to chili country, cooked with various experts in their kitchens, and tried out dozens of recipes in the test kitchen. We wanted a chili that would be hearty, heavy on the meat, and spicy but not overwhelmingly hot.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Macaroni and cheese and turkey Tetrazzini are two classic casseroles, but they are rarely as good as they could be. We knew we could do better—much better—in the test kitchen.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Pork chops are leaner than they used to be, which poses new problems for home cooks. We explain which chops to buy and how to cook them, ensuring perfectly cooked meat that is both crispy and juicy.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: On a hot summer's day, life doesn't get much better than a big, juicy, smoky slab of spicy, mouth-watering ribs. Our goal was to produce flavorful, juicy, tender ribs that would be well worth the time, money, and effort.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We were intrigued with the notion of barbecuing a whole side of salmon. Our goal was to have this large piece of fish spend enough time over the coals to pick up some real wood flavor.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We move the turkey out of the oven and onto the grill, freeing up precious cooking space for other Thanksgiving dishes and giving us a better tasting bird. We also perfect the flavor and texture of sweet potatoes and cranberry sauce.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Beef tenderloin can cost a small fortune, but it is one of the quickest and easiest large cuts to serve to a crowd. The key is to get good color development on the exterior without overcooking the interior.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Ham dinner—with green bean casserole—is classic American fare. But which kind of ham should you buy? And can you really make a "good" green bean casserole? We show you how.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Our sour cream coffee cake and light, flavorful fruit salads transform weekend brunch into an indulgent meal you'll want to make even when company isn't coming over. A few tips on great coffee round out the perfect start to a day.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: The appeal of such quick bread as cinnamon buns and banana bread is clear. Supermarket cinnamon buns often have an odd, artificial flavor and sponge-like texture. And banana bread doesn't need to taste like over-the-hill bananas.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Real country bread, the kind made by an artisan and never found at the supermarket, is a thing of beauty. We wanted to develop a recipe that was every bit as good as the best country loaves but that was still doable for the cook who bakes in a home oven.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Thick, chewy chocolate cookies and spiced molasses cookies are classics. Watch as we discover which types of chocolate and molasses make these favorites great again.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Lemon meringue pie is a three-part recipe—crust, lemon filling, and meringue—and each one can be a challenge. We discover which rolling pins are best and whether you can use store-bought pie crust in a pinch. Then we perfect the filling and meringue.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: What could be more American than strawberry shortcake? But sometimes this classic summer fare can go terribly wrong. When it comes to cherry cobbler, sour cherries are a must. But where do you get sour cherries? Are jarred cherries a worthy alternative?

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Who can resist a chocolate cake? We wanted cakes that would be great tasting and easy to prepare, and we came up with two: old-fashioned, moist, and homey; the other elegant, dense, and ethereal.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: A true New York-style cheesecake should be pure and minimalist but also have just the right color, flavor, and density. With a crisp graham cracker crust and a filling that fades from creamy to cake-like, our cheesecake is worthy of any diner in New York.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We set out to create flavorful, fresh-tasting versions of Greek and spinach salads.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: What's the best way to enjoy summer tomatoes? While it's hard to argue with sliced, salted tomatoes, there are times when you want to use tomatoes in more elaborate dishes, and gazpacho and a cheesy tart are two of our favorites.

programme.desc: Bellator MMA is back on The Big Island as Cris Cyborg puts her Bellator MMA Featherweight World Championship on the line against Arlene 'Angerfist' Blencowe.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA is in Paris, France as Heavyweight World Champion Ryan 'Darth' Bader defends his belt against Chieck Kongo. Also, Yoel 'Soldier of God' Romero, battles it out with fast-rising contender Alex 'Eazy' Polizzi in a light heavyweight showdown.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: The Bellator MMA Interim Welterweight World Championship is up for grabs as Michael 'Venom' Page takes on Logan 'Storm' Storley. Also, MMA legend Lyoto 'The Dragon' Machida goes up against Fabian 'The Assassin' Edwards.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA comes to Mohegan Sun as Gegard 'The Dreamcatcher' Mousas looks to pick up the 50th win of his legendary career when he puts his Bellator MMA Middleweight World Championship on the line against powerhouse Johnny 'The Human Cheat Code' Eblen.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA comes to Tacoma as Douglas 'The Phenom' Lima squares off with red-hot Jason 'The Ass-Kicking Machine' Jackson, with the winner moving one step closer to challenging for the Bellator MMA Welterweight World Championship.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA is in Sioux Falls, South Dakota as Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu black belts collide in a matchup between the best submission specialists on the Bellator roster as Neiman Gracie clashes with Goiti Yamauchi.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator 285: Henderson vs. Queally was a mixed martial arts event produced by Bellator MMA, that took place on 23 September 2022 at the 3Arena in Dublin, Ireland.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Some teens are catty, mean & spread lies, but what happens when gossip goes too far? Dr. Phil shares a personal story confronting gossip about himself. He then speaks with teen girls who are tangled in a web of gossip that changed their lives forever.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: We've all heard the saying, "Don't get mad, get even," but after watching this show, you may think twice before seeking vindication! You won't believe the twists and turns in this story of revenge with Deoborah and Todd! Pt. 2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Could you be raising a spoiled brat? Dr. Phil, along with Betsy Brown Braun, author of You're Not the Boss of Me, shows you how to tame your child's meltdowns. First up, Vanesa and Xavier say they can't handle their 4-year-old son Noah and his tantrums.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: A New Year can bring a new and improved you. Dr. Phil's guests say it's their loved ones who are the ones who need changing. It's been 10 years since Marcia has been on a date, and her daughter says it's time for her mom to get back in the game.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Parents say their children have gone from innocent adolescents to racy tweens. First up, 13-year-old Allison's parents describe her as a "boy magnet" who they fear is too young to understand the consequences of grown-up clothing & behavior.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: In her first nationally-televised interview, Angelique, 20, breaks her silence about a sinister plot she says she thwarted that almost claimed her life -- and that of her unborn baby.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Husband James says he's fighting for custody of his four children alleging his estranged wife, Jennifer, is controlled by a religious group. Jennifer developed an attachment to the ministry's leader, Doug Perry, of The Fellowship of the Martryrs (FOTM).

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Renee's husband, Kirby, made headlines after she videotaped him spanking her with a wooden spoon. What made Renee decide to record it and turn Kirby in to police? Is there any chance of saving this marriage? Plus, updates on some memorable former guests!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: In 2008, Julia was a single mom, homeless, & living in a car with daughters, Olivia, 15, Phoebe,12, & Olivia's newborn daughter. Her children entered foster care. Olivia's baby was adopted. This family seeks Dr. Phil's advice on reversing adoption. Pt. 1

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Best known for his dramatic weight loss, the former Subway pitchman was outed for sexual misconduct. Now, audio tapes detail Fogle's troubling conversations about children, sex and possibly using a child's party to lure victims.Pt. 2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Danielle & Brandon are in a custody war over their little daughter. Mom Danielle has visitation, & says her ex has threatened to kill her twice. Dad Brandon says Danielle is a terrible mother concerned with her 'nonexistent' acting/singing career. Pt. 1

programme.title: Best of Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dad’s admitted to shoplifting, drugging, now he’s moved in his mistress & Mom sleeps on the couch!

programme.title: Best of Dr. Phil
programme.desc: What happened to 18-yo Ebby Steppach? In the hours before she disappeared, did she leave behind any clues?

programme.title: Best of Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Laurie-Ann claims ex held her hostage; he says she's lying after being dumped.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny insists she doesn't need glasses, although she carries on a conversation with a pet seal, thinking it's Elly's new boyfriend.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Shorty Kellems, proprietor of the hotel in Silver Dollar, sells out and leaves the hills to join the Clampetts in California.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny uses her shotgun as she punishes Jethro for leading too wild a Hollywood life with Shorty Kellems.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mrs. Drysdale's nephew, who possesses a wealth of confidence but no talent, takes over Drysdale's private office at his Beverly Hills Bank.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts visit Hooterville and Jed arranges to go into the airline business with pilot Steve Elliott.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Banker Drysdale eagerly prepares to set up the deal for a new airline formed by Jed and farmer Howard Hewes, thinking him the famous millionaire Howard Hughes.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jed Clampett and Shad Heller conspire to line up Shorty Kellems as a husband for the strong-minded widow, Elverna Bradshaw.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The hillbillies unsuccessfully conspire to get Shorty Kellems married to Elverna Bradshaw.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Elusive Shorty Kellems gets off the marital hook by convincing his eager bride-to-be that he is an inveterate gambler.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jed and Shad Heller discover it's a full time job keeping Shorty Kellems corralled until his marriage to the indomitable Elverna.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Shorty Kellms again short circuits fiancee Elverna's wedding plans, this time by marrying Mr. Drysdale's prettiest secretary.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts set up a miniature farm so Shorty's bride Gloria can sample farm life, and soon the exhausted girl is delighted to hear she's not really married.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The hillbillies leave Shorty Kellems temporarily in charge of the Clampett mansion and he turns it into a hotel for single secretaries.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampett mansion is set up as a hotel for women, and banker Drysdale decides to extort a few dollars from his secretary guests.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The hillbillies again meet "Honest John," the con man who had sold them half of Manhattan and then returned their journey.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jed prepares to underwrite con man Honest John's scheme to drill a channel in the mountains to draw off the smog in Los Angeles.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The hillbillies plan to go to Washington to give the President their $95,000,000 fortune to help fight air pollution.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Romance enters Elly May's life in a big way when Navy Lt. Mark Templeton arrives at the Clampett mansion to pay a visit.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny consults a psychiatrist to give "modern medicine" a chance to keep frogman Mark Templeton from turning into a real frog.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny battles to keep her family out of the swimming pool, convinced that if they get wet they'll turn into frogs.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny invites Shorty Kellems back from the hills to help break up Elly May's romance with Mark Templeton.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny thinks Shorty Kellems has turned into a seal because he ignored her warnings about swimming in the Clampett pool.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny is finally convinced that Elly May's boyfriend, Mark Templeton, is a human being -- not half-frog as she first suspected.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jed, Granny, Elly May, and Jethro man the front lines against an expected invasion of grunion, which they believe to be hostile aliens.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The hillbillies, encouraged by Mr. Drysdale, continue to guard the Malibu beach and repel the mythical Grunion invaders.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Drysdale's downtrodden bank secretaries organize to fight for better wages and working conditions.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny and Elly May join the Women's Liberation Movement and leave all the household chores to Jed and Jethro.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S01E007) "Delusions of glamour" overcome Brenda when she meets Kelly's beautiful mother Jackie, a former model.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S01E008) The Walsh parents examine their relationship while Brenda and Brandon examine theirs, as they get involved in a UCLA study on twins.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S01E009) Sympathy and responsibility are at odds when Brenda volunteers for a teen crisis hotline.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S01E010) The chemistry between Brenda and Dylan starts to heat up when Brenda accidentally catches him in the shower, then comforts him after he fights with his father.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S01E011) Both Walsh twins face the temptation to drink alcohol when their peers are doing it all around them.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S01E013) Pillow talk threatens to destroy Brenda's sleep-over as all the girls share their deepest secrets, with unexpected results.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S01E014) The Walsh's agree to let their maid's niece, Carla, use their address to enroll at West Beverly.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S01E015) A weekend in Palm Springs goes awry when David invites Steve, Kelly and Donna to join him at his grandparents' house while they're away on a cruise-but he gets the dates confused, and they're still there.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S01E016) Brandon is "discovered" when he's out roller-blading, landing a role as an emergency extra on a big TV show.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S01E017) Brenda's had it with home life and West Beverly and decides to leave both for the real world.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S01E018) The Walsh twins and all their friends are panicked by the upcoming SATs, but then everything gets put in perspective when Brenda finds a lump in her breast and faces a test no one can prepare for.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S01E019) Brandon interviews a classmate, Roger, who's an outstanding athlete and student--and haunted by the overbearing success of his father.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S01E020) Baseball fever strikes when Brandon is asked to coach a little league team after his dad gets injured.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Juicio apresurado
programme.desc: Cuando Jamie es captado por la cámara cometiendo lo que podría interpretarse como brutalidad policial en una manifestación contra las políticas, Frank se ve obligado a entregar el caso a Asuntos Internos.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): El Mustang Bullitt
programme.desc: Danny y Báez investigan el robo del famoso coche que se conducía en una película clásica, ahora propiedad de Owen Cairo (Anthony Edwards).

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: UAC está buscando a un sospechoso que tal vez esté fascinado por inquietantes experimentos médicos.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC implementa una estrategia elaborada para tratar de acabar con el anillo de sicarios “Los doce sucios”, con Reid jugando un papel central.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando se encuentran cuerpos en lugares públicos alrededor de Boston, el UAC investiga si un taxi o servicio de transporte que las víctimas utilizaron antes de su muerte podría guiar hasta el sospechoso.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC busca un móvil y un sospechoso cuando las víctimas se encuentran en los inodoros de las paradas de camiones a lo largo de las carreteras en todo el sur.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo se dirige a Los Ángeles para colaborar con el equipo local en la investigación de un asesinato, que pronto se convierte en algo mucho más grande. Mientras tanto, Tony empieza a investigar la vida privada de Ziva.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: En Los Ángeles, Gibbs y McGee siguen colaborando con la división del NCIS para rastrear a un grupo terrorista.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Cuando asesinan a un agente de ICE tras una brecha de seguridad en la casa del Secretario de la Marina, el equipo del NCIS tiene que colaborar con el FBI y el ICE para resolver el caso.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Después de la confrontación entre Tony y Rivkin, el equipo del NCIS viaja a Israel para una confrontación final, pero no son bien recibidos por el padre de Ziva, que es el jefe del Mossad.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): El Mustang Bullitt
programme.desc: Danny y Báez investigan el robo del famoso coche que se conducía en una película clásica, ahora propiedad de Owen Cairo (Anthony Edwards).

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Héroes olvidados
programme.desc: Cuando Danny y su familia son amenazados por Thomas Wilder (Louis Cancelmi), un asesino en serie que Danny no ha podido detener, la preocupación de Linda se intensifica por el trabajo de su marido y por el estado de su matrimonio.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Resistencia
programme.desc: Erin retoma un caso de homicidio estancado y, con la ayuda de Anthony Abetemarco, busca un testigo clave que había desaparecido.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Las banderas de nuestros padres
programme.desc: Danny es interrogado por el investigador del fiscal de distrito cuando su expareja es acusada de colocar pruebas para cerrar un caso de homicidio.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A motorcyclist wanted by police hides out in his mom's garage, a man won't leave his ex-fiancee alone, and a pregnant woman gets busted for meth possession.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An officer on street patrol chases down a suspect on foot, an alleged car thief posts his exploits on Facebook, and a crashed stolen car may not have been stolen after all.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A police pursuit of a truck leaving a known drug location ends in a crash, undercover officers move in for a drug bust, and a man recklessly fires his handgun in the street.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An officer pursues an unruly bicyclist, a man ducks into a drive-through in an attempt to elude police, and a deputy pulls over a stolen vehicle driven by a repeat offender.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A resistant suspect thinks he sees monsters everywhere. Cops are forced to officiate a spousal wrestling match. Officers try to sort out where two motorists got their car and whose dope they possess.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A wild-eyed man leads police on a chase that ends in a Tasing, officers respond to an in-progress lovers' spat, and a traffic stop results in drug and auto theft charges.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A driver takes his unsuspecting passenger on a wild ride as he tries to evade police, a man's date is cut short by a traffic stop, and police are called to evict a roommate.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man arrested on warrants just wants his wife, a vagrant is caught on camera stealing from a liquor store, and officers check on a woman asleep on the side of the road.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police have a breakthrough in a burglary case, a man found with drugs in his pants claims the pants are not his, and officers deal with a familiar domestic disturbance call.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers wrestle with a familiar nuisance to shop owners, a man's lucky dollar lets him down during a traffic stop, and too much whiskey leads to a domestic disturbance call.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A cyclist takes flight, police find a woman at the wheel of a stolen truck, and officers roll up on a couple smoking meth while their four-year-old is in the car with them.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: The threat of a tasing is enough to slow a fleeing suspect, a heated argument between girlfriends leads to vehicular assault, and a man with weed in his car has no poker face.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An unstable man in a standoff with officers begs to be shot, a drunk woman is accused of beating her spouse, and unwanted guests occupy the garage of an out-of-town homeowner.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A trespassing man uses his dog as a shield when police arrive at the scene, a stolen tablet leads to a bloody altercation, and kittens run wild in a Florida neighborhood.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect seen fleeing a vehicle refuses to admit he was ever in said vehicle, and police respond to a call that shots were fired.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An arrested man has a long list of instructions for his "bae," and a driver charged with heroin possession claims he was framed by the passenger in his backseat.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A recently released convict leads police on a high-speed chase in a stolen vehicle, and officers respond to a report of a man pulling a knife on his brother.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A son fights his mom and responding officers, a man tells police the wad of weed in his mouth is not his, and a pack of cigarillos is the root of a domestic dispute.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: After deputies pursue a car-theft suspect to his home, he tries to convince them he has been there all along, and a man violates a protection order to try to reconcile with his wife.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Carjacking victims flag down officers whom then locate, pursue and acquire the stolen vehicle, and a man admits to officers the car he's driving is stolen.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An officer finds a woman asleep at the wheel in the middle of a highway, deputies investigate a possible kidnapping, and a nervous driver just wants to be honest with police.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An officer tracks a suspect down a treacherous cliffside, a man puts his brother and elderly father at risk, and a man asks police to take his son to jail.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspected car thief's claims of innocence are undermined by a video he shot of himself earlier that day, and the pursuit of a suspected drunk driver has a surprising end.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A car eludes a DUI checkpoint only to crash, one woman takes the fall for everyone in her group, and a man hides his stash in the one place he thinks police will never look.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A shifty suspect claims he wasn't the driver of a wrecked vehicle police were pursuing, and a detained cyclist attempts a tricky maneuver to rid himself of damning evidence.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Reckless ATV drivers lead police on a dangerous chase through the streets of Atlanta, and a man worried about warrants lies about his identity to police during a traffic stop.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Torrential rain hampers the pursuit of a fleeing vehicle, a man on a moped is carrying more than he lets on, and a persistent police officer unravels a sketchy man's story.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Sara is uneasy about Grissom being reunited with Lady Heather during the CSIs' investigation of her attempted murder by a client she refuses to name.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: As the CSI team comes closer than ever to identifying the miniature killer, Sara mysteriously goes missing, forcing her relationship with Grissom out into the open.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Sara's fate remains in question as the CSI team rushes to find out if she survived an attack by the miniature killer, on the eighth season premiere.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates two unusual cases, one involving the suspicious death of a go-cart racer who took his hobby to the highway and paid the price with his life, and a murder at a hip new restaurant where patrons dine in the dark.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates the murder of an entire family, except for one daughter, who supposedly is possessed by the devil.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and his team discover a young man strangled to death by hanging ...whose body looks like that of a woman.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team goes behind the scenes at a horror porn film studio to investigate the murder of a slasher film actress murdered on the set of one of her movies.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: In Part One of a Two-Part crossover episode to conclude on Without A Trace, a kidnap victim from New York who went missing six years ago may be the same boy whose death Grissom and the CSI team are investigating in Las Vegas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A suspect from Sara's past returns, causing her to question her future as a CSI.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Warrick's addiction to pills begins to impact his job when his investigation into the underground mob in Vegas results in him being targeted as the prime suspect in a mob-related murder case.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Hodges has ulterior motives when he stages hypothetical murders in the lab to give his colleagues a chance to play CSI.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and his team delve into the world of illegal dog fighting to find out who is responsible for the death of a wealthy socialite.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and his team investigate two murders that take place at the annual bull riding rodeo in Las Vegas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and his team battle the flu when they are called upon by DDA Klein to investigate the deaths of several key witnesses for a grand jury case against a dangerous Las Vegas gang.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom y su equipo descubren varias víctimas que tienen sangre verde, lo que les lleva a la conclusión de que sus muertes están conectadas de algún modo.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom y el equipo de CSI se ven envueltos en el mundo de la comedia de Hollywood cuando una diva de las comedias de situación (Sagal) muere prematuramente durante el rodaje de su programa en Las Vegas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Warrick es acusado de asesinar a un famoso gángster de Las Vegas e incluso él no está seguro de su culpabilidad o inocencia.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Gil Grissom es el supervisor del turno de noche de los investigadores de élite de la escena del crimen de Las Vegas. Holly Gribbs, recién salida de la academia, se une al equipo.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Un hombre es asesinado después de haber ganado una fortuna y haber dejado a su novia. Entonces, Grissom, Nick y la recién llegada al equipo de CSI, Sara Sidle, investigan este caso.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom, Nick y Sara buscan a una mujer secuestrada y encuentran más de lo que esperaban. Catherine y Warrick investigan la muerte por atropello con fuga de una niña.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom y Catherine investigan la aparición de una pierna cortada de un cuerpo en un lago. Mientras tanto, Sara y Nick investigan un juramento de fraternidad que ha salido terriblemente mal.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom y Warrick toman el caso de un joven que es descubierto desnudo en el desierto sin una causa obvia de muerte.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Catherine viola el protocolo del departamento cuando acepta el caso de una acusación de violación contra su exmarido. Warrick y Sara buscan la bala perdida que exonerará o acusará a un policía de asesinato.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando una adolescente y su hermana son las únicas supervivientes del espantoso asesinato de cuatro miembros de una familia en un tranquilo barrio suburbano, Grissom y todo su equipo investigan el crimen.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Royce Harmon fue asesinado hace 3 meses en una escena montada para que pareciera un suicidio. Ahora se ha producido otro asesinato.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom y su equipo investigan la muerte de un pasajero de primera clase en un vuelo a Las Vegas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom y Sara investigan un cuerpo plagado de bichos encontrado en el desierto. Warrick y Catherine investigan el robo de unas valiosas obras de arte.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Una mujer es secuestrada en un supermercado. En la tienda, Grissom encuentra la puerta de un baño que dice que cinco mujeres han sido asesinadas.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When America’s sweetheart, Phoebe Nichols, bursts into flames during a concert, the CSIs expose the dark side of pop stardom.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The bizarre case of a man chopped in half baffles the Horatio and the CSI team, while Natalia's injury puts her and Ryan in jeopardy.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio and the CSI team have 24 hours to find out if a man on death row is truly guilty, and Eric Delko returns to work the case.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio Caine and the CSI team solve the murder of a man who was killed in outer space before returning his body to beautiful Miami.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio Caine and Delko must travel to bright and sunny Los Angeles when a secret from Jesse's past may allow a killer to go free.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio Caine and the CSI team unravel a complicated workplace murder mystery when a hated receptionist is found murdered in beautiful Miami.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When Horatio Caine's son Kyle returns from the war, he seeks the help of his father and the CSI team to solve a disturbing murder.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Spring Break raises the body count in Miami when Horatio Caine and the CSI team splits up to solve three different murders.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A victim's spirit won't leave Calleigh alone until she finds justice for his murder. She must enlist the help of Horatio and the rest of the CSI team.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A seemingly perfect jewelry heist ends in murder and when crime scene evidence is stolen from the lab, and Delko returns to find the culprit.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a suburban soccer mom is murdered, the CSIs uncover her family's dark past, while Delko continues his undercover mission.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When Horatio Caine's ex-girlfriend is killed in an explosion, the team looks within their own department to find the killer.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A serial killer taunts the CSIs by leaving them cryptic hints, and the longer it takes them to decode these puzzles, the higher the death toll rises.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The CSI team suffers the tragic loss of one of their own when a psychotic genius runs wild in otherwise beautiful Miami.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: La vida de Yelina está en peligro cuando Horatio y el equipo de CSI trabajan en un caso para condenar a un rapero sospechoso de un tiroteo al estilo de Miami desde un auto en movimiento.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Un flash mob surge en un campo de golf privado, ¿el grupo de estudiantes estaba allí para esconder un cuerpo o para dejar uno?

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Empujan a una mujer frente a un tren en movimiento del metro de Miami y tanto su novio como la exnovia acosadora son sospechosos de su asesinato.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: El ambiente de discoteca de Miami se vuelve mortal cuando el consumo de alcohol por parte de menores provoca un sangriento asesinato en un baño, Horatio y el equipo de CSI investigan.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Un viaje de campo del jurado a la escena de un asesinato provoca un vuelco legal cuando el acusado termina muerto y los doce miembros del jurado se convierten en los principales sospechosos.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Una noche de citas rápidas para los solteros de Miami se vuelve mortal para un machote de South Beach que está en el extremo equivocado del carro.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Miami Beach es evacuada debido a un tsunami, pero el equipo de CSI permanece después de descubrir un complot de robo a un banco mientras investiga un asesinato aparentemente aleatorio.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Una serie de cadáveres, encontrados frente a la costa de Miami, resulta ser obra de piratas modernos. Horatio y el equipo investigan.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Un hombre inocente muere cuando alguien cae sobre él desde un balcón. El equipo de CSI se encuentra en el centro de un escándalo de sexo y un asesinato.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Un robo de auto aparentemente al azar resulta ser lo contrario cuando la adicción al juego de una mujer joven se vuelve más de lo que la empresa familiar puede soportar.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: La investigación de un tiroteo en la sala de emergencias de un hospital coloca al equipo de CSI en medio de un caso de asesinato que involucra al líder de una pandilla callejera importante.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Una parada de tránsito de rutina termina con el asesinato de un patrullero. El equipo de CSI debe resolver la obsesiva historia de amor de una joven para encontrar al asesino.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Una fiesta de fricción en una suite privada de uno de los hoteles de la ciudad que alberga a cientos de pasajeros de cruceros deja a una joven muerta.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio se enfrenta a un antiguo archienemigo que ya se le escapó una vez, un caso de robo de identidad conduce al asesinato, la pregunta es: ¿quién lo hizo?.

programme.desc: Mac is summoned from a night at the opera to a bloody crime scene. Across town, a famous bachelor is found dead in his swim gym.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a paintball player is found shot to death, Flack realizes that a dirty cop under his supervision could be to blame.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: After a night of heavy partying two underage girls make the reckless decision to drive home. In route, the girls get into an accident.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac and Flack investigate the death of a parachute professional whose chute was pelted with dead pigeons causing him to plummet to the ground.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When Hawkes is framed for shooting a bartender and then later sent to prison, the team takes to the street to set their investigator free.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac and Stella work with a deaf family to find their daughter’s killer. The team investigates the murder of a young skating sensation.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a rich real estate agent is found dead in a brownstone, Mac and Stella work with evidence that suggests he was either a kidnapper or kidnapee.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Danny and Mac find a corpse in a salt truck which is then later identified to be a high-powered extreme sports executive.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a college student is found dead in a maze at the Queen’s county farm museum, the CSIs discover a cult-like fraternity with harsh punishments.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac investigates the death of a girl found in a bathtub filled with rose petals. Stella questions the death of a man who fell in his fish tank.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac and Danny investigate a case in which a delusional ex-con is found dead in his home while lying on top of a bed of cash.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The team investigates a case in which magic-trick inspired murders occur including a woman being cut in half while in a wooden box.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Danny and Lindsay find popular chef Alec Green dead in the wine cellar of his trendy restaurant with a corkscrew dangling from his chest.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A knight in shining armor impaled with a lance in central park and a businessman stabbed by an ice pick in a nearby hotel share a connection.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: Cuando un guardia de seguridad es asesinado a puñaladas, Mac y Flack van de prisa a la escena. Mientras investigan el asesinato, estalla una bomba.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: Cuando dos saltadores de puenting presencian una muerte en el puente de Brooklyn, Mac y su nuevo interés amoroso, Peyton Driscoll, son llamados para investigar.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: Cuando imitadoras de Holly Golightly roban una joyería, los detectives cuestionan la participación de las chicas en el mundo de los diamantes de sangre.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: Danny y Lindsay investigan la muerte de una modelo de publicidad de vodka vestida de Reina de Hielo y asesinada con su cetro en un evento promocional.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: Un asesino en serie deja a sus víctimas con camisetas codificadas. El equipo lucha por descifrar sus pistas mitológicas y poner a su principal sospechoso tras las rejas.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: Danny y Lindsay exploran los mundos del gótico y el glamour cuando una mujer joven que pertenece al culto clandestino de las chicas suicidas, es encontrada muerta.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: Una joven empleada de hotel cae desde la azotea de un hotel y muere después de verse envuelta en un trato con una supermodelo confabuladora.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: Mac está en una noche de ópera y lo convocan a una sangrienta escena de crimen. Al otro lado de la ciudad, encuentran muerto a un famoso soltero en su alberca.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: Cuando encuentran a un jugador de paintball muerto a tiros, Flack se da cuenta de que un policía corrupto que está bajo su supervisión podría ser el culpable.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: Después de una noche de fiesta intensa, dos chicas menores de edad toman la imprudente decisión de ir conduciendo a casa. En el camino, las chicas sufren un accidente.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: Mac y Flack investigan la muerte de un profesional del paracaidismo cuyo paracaídas fue atacado con palomas muertas que lo hicieron caer al suelo.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: Cuando incriminan a Hawkes por dispararle a un camarero y luego lo envían a prisión, el equipo sale a la calle para liberar a su investigador.

programme.desc: Cuando un rico agente inmobiliario es encontrado muerto en una casa, Mac y Stella trabajan con pruebas que sugieren que él fue secuestrador o secuestrado.

programme.desc: Dayani usa una aplicación para buscar relaciones sexuales, una foto la atrae. Además, Julio financió la reconstrucción vaginal de su esposa, pero su terapia incluye la penetración del doctor.

programme.desc: Amanda quiere emanciparse para casarse con un hombre mucho mayor que ella e inválido, su padre se opone. También, Michelle se enamora de Alex y lo trae a Estados Unidos, ella sospecha algo.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: La madre de Arturo tiene alzhéimer, está en un centro de cuidado, él quiere sacarla, su esposa se opone. Además, Alejandra tiene una parafilia singular, se excita con el llanto de su esposo.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Norma casó a su hijo con una cubana para obtener los papeles, pero ellos se gustan. En otro caso, Ángel fue novio de Alonso en la cárcel y aunque pensaban casarse, habí­a una mujer entre ellos.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Néstor se casó con la exesposa de su amigo Junior y se hizo cargo de su hija, pero ahora la mujer murió. Además, Andrés es un blogger que fomenta un juego en Internet muy peligroso.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Juan y su mujer se asfixiaban hasta llegar al orgasmo, hasta que él la mató. Por otro lado, Keno y Joel contratan a Jessi para ser la actriz de su videoclip, pero ella resultó ser transexual.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Nikanol se casó en Venezuela, al llegar a Estados Unidos descubrió que su mujer se volvió a casar y falleció. Él reclama la herencia. Además, Lina e Iván están separados, pero seguían juntos.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: María y Ricardo no se ponen de acuerdo en cómo educar a su hijo, ella es más recta, mientras él es permisivo. También, Angie y Violeta corren carreras de autos y tienen diferencias.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: En su despedida de soltero, Félix contrató a dos strippers hermanas y una de ellas era menor de edad. Además, a David le queda poco tiempo de vida por su obesidad a causa de la comida chatarra.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Una jovencita apareció muerta junto a su novio en un motel de paso. Por otro lado, Yolanda tiene problemas con su esposo y contrata los servicios de una cocinera para provocarlo.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Lola obliga a su esposo Rocco a inyectarse esteroides para tener mejor desempeño físico y sexual. Además, Ángela descubrió que una alumna está siendo abusada por un familiar.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: El hijo de Karla está preso porque supuestamente violó a la hija de Manuela. Además, Cristian es un mesero, sin papeles, que fue despedido por pedirles documentación a los clientes.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Claudia y Patricia vivían en trío en un motorhome con el hermano de Ricardo, el chico murió. También, Diego vive con Néstor, un "dreamer" sin papeles, a quien siempre discrimina e insulta.

programme.desc: Annette catches her husband with someone new. Tom finds out his girlfriend likes to play when she's away.

programme.title: Cheaters

programme.title: Cheaters

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Diane finds a coat and believes the mysterious owner is the man of her dreams.

programme.desc: Carla's 16-year-old wants to marry his high school sweetheart.

programme.title: Cheers

programme.desc: The Cheers gang challenges a rival bar to a bowling tournament.

programme.desc: Diane uses Sam as a case study for a paper in her Human Sexuality class, but she paints an unflattering picture of him. Meanwhile, Woody challenges Carla to a sports trivia contest, and Cliff grows a unique squash.

programme.title: Cheers

programme.desc: Sam flips when Frasier wants to marry the first girl he dates after Lilith.

programme.desc: Norm gets a tip at work that could guarantee his promotion over the competition.

programme.title: Cheers

programme.desc: Carla turns to Sam as a partner to go up against Nick and Loretta in a dance competition.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Woody feels replaceable when an entertaining bartender overshadows him.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Sam expresses interest in politics when he falls for a woman running for city council.

programme.title: Frasier

programme.title: Frasier

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Frasier's plan to "fix up" Daphne with his new boss goes awry when Frasier learns his secret.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: After witnessing a woman give birth, Niles decides it's time to practice his parenting skills -- on a sack of flour!

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Frasier and Niles are upset when they learn that they're investors in the company slated to demolish their father's favorite hangout.

programme.title: 3 hombres en mi vida
programme.desc: Carmen es una hermosa mujer que vive junto a su esposo Leonardo, un hombre desempleado y alcohólico. Tras un accidente, Carmen conoce a Fernando, un chofer, y al Dr. Carlos Junco, quienes intentarán conquistar su amor.

programme.title: El Potro Salvaje
programme.desc: Gastón halla en el campo el cadáver de Gerardo, dueño del potro blanco Rayo de Plata, e impide que el animal sea asesinado por El Manco.

programme.title: Ladronzuela
programme.desc: Una ladrona huerfana vive en la calle con tres niños que cantan en los camiones y termina en la cárcel por defenderlos.

programme.title: Carne de presidio
programme.desc: Pedro es declarado culpable de asesinato tras matar accidentalmente al esposo de una amiga. Mientras su familia enfrenta tiempos difíciles, él cometerá un grave error al confiar su libertad en la persona equivocada.

programme.title: El bruto
programme.desc: El dueño de un edificio planea desalojar a sus inquilinos para venderlo. Ante la resistencia de los afectados, y con la ayuda de su amante, contrata a un matón para que se encargue de los desalojos de manera violenta.

programme.title: Acá las tortas (Los hijos de los ricos)
programme.desc: Don Chente y Dolores son un matrimonio que dirige una modesta pero exitosa tortería. Cuando sus hijos regresan tras terminar sus estudios en el extranjero, deberán lidiar con sus refinados gustos y constantes solicitudes económicas.

programme.title: La cabeza de Pancho Villa
programme.desc: En sus últimos resoplos de vida, un hombre entrega una caja a sus amigos, pidiéndoles protegerla con su propia vida. Un grupo de forajidos anda tras la caja, lo que desatará una pugna sanguinaria.

programme.title: El revólver sangriento
programme.desc: Cuando uno nace con el alma de un pistolero, todo lo que uno piensa es matar. Su fiel compañero para esto es un Revolver, pero este es el caso de un REVOLVER SANGRIENTO que no tiene miedo, incluso mientras realiza sus deseos más mortales.

programme.title: Sospecha Mortal
programme.desc: Richard Gere es Peck, y Andy Garcia es Raymond Avila, un investigador decidido a llevar a Peck a la justicia en este thriller policial emocionante.

programme.title: Frontera hostil
programme.desc: Luego de ser deportada, Claudia debe elegir entre reconciliarse con su padre, de quien está distanciada, o juntarse con un peligroso contrabandista para poder volver a Estados Unidos.

programme.title: Telaraña
programme.desc: Después de la horrible muerte de su compañero, el detective y escritor Alex Cross se ha refugiado en la paz de su retiro. Pero cuando un criminal brillante (Michael Wincott) secuestra a la hija de un senador, Alex debe volver a la acción.

programme.title: Besos que matan
programme.desc: Ocho mujeres secuestradas, todas hermosas, todas talentosas, todas en peligro de perder su vida cruelmente, si el detective Alex Cross y la testigo clave Kate McTiernan no logran localizar al escurridizo “coleccionista” que se hace llamar Casanova.

programme.title: La llegada
programme.desc: Cuando las naves espaciales aterrizan en todo el mundo, la traductora Louise Banks es enviada para descifrar su intención. A medida que aumentan las tensiones, Banks aprende la verdad y debe tomar una oportunidad que podría amenazar a la humanidad.

programme.title: Babel
programme.desc: Del aclamado director Alejandro González Iñárritu (Amores Perros, 21 Gramos) llega el tercer filme de su trilogía, Babel, una película aplaudida por la crítica y de una gran emotividad sobre las barreras que separan a la humanidad.

programme.title: El sabor del amor
programme.desc: Alice, una joven y talentosa sous chef del mejor restaurante de Nueva York, recibe una invitación para ser jueza de un concurso de comida para una prestigiosa recaudación de fondos anual.

programme.title: Prueba de amor
programme.desc: Desde que se conocen en medio del caos de la universidad en Nueva York, Al (Freddie Prinze Jr.) e Imogen (Julia Stiles) comienzan una aventura romántica en la que el amor verdadero a veces compite con la tentación de alejarse del compromiso.

programme.title: Amigos con derechos
programme.desc: Un chico y una chica intentan mantener su relación estrictamente física, pero no pasa mucho tiempo antes de que aprendan que quieren algo más.

programme.title: About Adam
programme.desc: Cuando la despreocupada Lucy (Kate Hudson) al fin conoce a su hombre perfecto, Adam (Stuart Townsend), está lista para sentar cabeza de verdad. Pero mientras Lucy está ocupada planeando la boda, Adam está ocupado ¡encantando al resto de su familia!

programme.title: Prueba de amor
programme.desc: Desde que se conocen en medio del caos de la universidad en Nueva York, Al (Freddie Prinze Jr.) e Imogen (Julia Stiles) comienzan una aventura romántica en la que el amor verdadero a veces compite con la tentación de alejarse del compromiso.

programme.title: Amigos con derechos
programme.desc: Un chico y una chica intentan mantener su relación estrictamente física, pero no pasa mucho tiempo antes de que aprendan que quieren algo más.

programme.title: Aires de esperanza
programme.desc: Del director Jason Reitman, Aires de Esperanza presenta a Kate Winslet y Josh Brolin como dos extraños que se conocen inesperadamente. Lo que comienza como un encuentro durante un fin de semana, se transforma en una segunda oportunidad para el amor.

programme.title: El gran jefe
programme.desc: Bruce Lee se enfrenta a un elemento criminal y clandestino después de que miembros de su familia comienzan a desaparecer. Ahora debe romper su voto de ninguna violencia para enfrentarse al aterrador "Gran Jefe."

programme.title: La furia del dragón
programme.desc: La película dirigida por el legendario Bruce Lee está llena de acción y escenas épicas de lucha. Lee visita a sus familiares en el restaurante que tienen en Italia y los ayuda a defenderse de los mafiosos que los hostigan.

programme.title: El tesoro de Da Vinci
programme.desc: Un antropólogo forense aburrido debe desentrañar el misterioso código encerrado en las obras de Leonardo Da Vinci. Basada en hechos históricos.

programme.title: El superciclón
programme.desc: Cuando un súper ciclón amenaza a toda la costa este de Estados Unidos, un meteorólogo solitario y un ingeniero petrolero deben luchar contra los elementos para detener la amenaza.

programme.title: Survivor (2015)
programme.desc: Incriminada por crímenes que no cometió, una diplomática (Milla Jovovich, El quinto elemento) trata de impedir un ataque terrorista en Nueva York. Con Pierce Brosnan y Dylan McDermott.

programme.title: Asesinatos accidentales
programme.desc: Mike Fallon es un sicario experimentado conocido por hacer que la muerte de sus objetivos parezca un accidente. Cuando su novia aparece muerta, él va tras sus antiguos colegas para encontrar al responsable.

programme.title: Robocop
programme.desc: Cuando unos criminales hacen volar por los aires a un policía modelo, un equipo de científicos y doctores le reconstruyen a partir de sus restos y le convierten en un organismo cibernético, programado para combatir el crimen sin descanso: Robocop.

programme.title: No eres tú, soy yo
programme.desc: Después de la ruptura de su reciente matrimonio, Javier se encuentra en una depresión de la que ni siquiera un psiquiatra puede ayudarlo a salir. Sin embargo, la esperanza está en camino en la forma improbable de sus exnovias.

programme.title: Hazlo como hombre
programme.desc: Mauricio Ochmann y Aislinn Derbez protagonizan esta divertidísima comedia sobre un hombre cuyo mundo se pone patas arriba cuando su mejor amigo - y futuro cuñado - le anuncia que es gay.

programme.title: La isla mínima
programme.desc: Se producen una serie de crímenes brutales contra chicas adolescentes en un paraje remoto del sur de España. Dos detectives, con personalidades contrapuestas, son designados para investigar.

programme.title: Aqui Entre Nos (LAS)
programme.desc: Cansado de ser dado por sentado por su esposa y sus 3 hijas, Rodolfo Guerra se levanta una mañana y decide no ir a trabajar. Entonces comienza la locura.

programme.title: Ya veremos
programme.desc: Los padres de Santi están divorciados, y él está acostumbrado a vivir con ellos pero por separado. Tras una urgente cirugía para salvar su vista, Santi decide hacer una lista de deseos por cumplir pero con sus padres unidos.

programme.title: Tod@s caen
programme.desc: Tras su éxito en la taquillera pelicula No Manches Frida 2, Omar Chaparro y Martha Higared llegan a la gran pantalla con la divertidísima comedia romántica TODOS CAEN.

programme.title: El Crimen del Padre Amaro LAS
programme.desc: La política y las pasiones sexuales amenazan con corromper a un joven sacerdote recién ordenado en un pequeño pueblo mexicano.

programme.title: Teaching Mrs. Tingle
programme.desc: El sueño de Leigh Ann (Katie Holmes) de acceder a una beca se viene abajo cuando su profesora, la Sra. Tingle, la acusa falsamente de hacer trampa. Desesperada por probar su inocencia, hace un plan que le enseñará una lección a la Sra. Tingle.

programme.title: Atracción diabólica
programme.desc: Inyectada con células cerebrales humanas, una mona superinteligente es contratada para ayudar a un tetrapléjico en su vida cotidiana.

programme.title: Dioses del Abismo
programme.desc: Cuando una misión audaz lleva a un equipo de submarinismo de aguas profundas a una misteriosa apertura en el fondo oceánico, descubren un mundo submarino perdido y despiertan a su antigua raza de seres de otro mundo.

programme.title: Darkness
programme.desc: Anna Paquin protagoniza este thriller en el que caracteriza a una adolescente cuya vida cambia cuando su familia se muda a una nueva casa con secretos. Poco después una serie de sucesos sobrenaturales desencadenarán el mal que habita en la casa.

programme.title: La hija de la luz
programme.desc: Con rasgos que rememoran al sexto sentido y la profecía llega este fascinante thriller sobrenatural lleno de escalofríos y un gran suspenso.

programme.title: El aro
programme.desc: Sonaba como otra leyenda urbana- un videotape con imágenes de pesadilla conduciendo a una llamada telefónica previendo la muerte del espectador en exactamente siete días.

programme.title: El aro 2
programme.desc: Cuando la evidencia en la escena del crimen local revela un misterioso y anónimo video, Rachel se da cuenta que Samara ha vuelto y está más decidida que nunca a continuar su despiadado ciclo del terror.

programme.title: Ladrones
programme.desc: Fernando Colunga y Eduardo Yáñez lideran las risas como los Robin Hoods modernos en esta tremendamente entretenida secuela del gran éxito "Ladrón que roba a ladrón".

programme.title: Feo de día, lindo de noche
programme.desc: Un hombre que desea ser lindo para poder vivir una vida de privilegio en una sociedad que le atribuye a la belleza el éxito. Pero no sabe que su gran deseo se convertirá en su mayor desafío.

programme.title: Los lunamieleros
programme.desc: El conductor de autobuses Ralph Kramden y el ingeniero de saneamiento ambiental Ed Norton son amigos que sueñan con llegar lejos. Su plan para volverse ricos los hace contratar a un entrenador de perros (Leguizamo) para hacer competir a su galgo.

programme.title: Mil palabras
programme.desc: El agente charlatán Jack McCall (Eddie Murphy) tiene la mira puesta en un gurú, el Dr. Sinja. Cuando aparece un misterioso árbol Bodhi en su patio, Jack se da cuenta de que deberá portarse mejor antes de que caiga la última hoja del árbol, o morirá.

programme.title: Un Guardaespaldas Escolar
programme.desc: Dos estudiantes de secundaria acosados por un matón ponen un anuncio en una revista en busca de un guardaespaldas y reciben respuesta de un veterano vagabundo.

programme.title: Fútbol Kung Fu
programme.desc: En esta risueña y llamativa comedia, un equipo de inadaptados se esfuerza por ganar un campeonato mezclando artes marciales con fútbol. Utilizando un juego poco ortodoxo, se enfrentan al temido equipo malo en la batalla final por el título.

programme.title: Los lunamieleros
programme.desc: El conductor de autobuses Ralph Kramden y el ingeniero de saneamiento ambiental Ed Norton son amigos que sueñan con llegar lejos. Su plan para volverse ricos los hace contratar a un entrenador de perros (Leguizamo) para hacer competir a su galgo.

programme.title: Mil palabras
programme.desc: El agente charlatán Jack McCall (Eddie Murphy) tiene la mira puesta en un gurú, el Dr. Sinja. Cuando aparece un misterioso árbol Bodhi en su patio, Jack se da cuenta de que deberá portarse mejor antes de que caiga la última hoja del árbol, o morirá.

programme.title: Breakheart Pass
programme.desc: As a train races through the Rocky Mountains, the passengers are being murdered! The only hope is John Deakin (Charles Bronson) who uncovers a secret that explodes in a torrent of shocking revelations, explosive brawls, and blazing gun battles.

programme.title: Duel at Diablo
programme.desc: Frontier scout Jess Remsberg leads a wagon train through hostile territory to Fort Conchos. But underneath his valor, he has an ulterior motive: to settle a score with the man he believes killed his wife. James Garner and Sidney Poitier star.

programme.title: Invitation to a Gunfighter
programme.desc: Screen legend Yul Brynner turns in a magnificent performance as a gunfighter who must do battle with his most formidable adversary - his own conscience - in this gripping, double-barreled western full of surprise twists and colorful villainy.

programme.title: Black Fox
programme.desc: This wild Western tells of Alan Johnson (Christopher Reeve, "Superman") and his friend whom he freed from slavery as they settle with their families in Texas in the 1860s and begin a new life.

programme.title: Black Fox 2: The Price of Peace
programme.desc: The western saga continues as Alan's family is caught in the deadly crossfire of a revenge plot against Britt. After Alan's wife is slain, he and Britt hunt the bigot responsible for her death.

programme.title: Vera Cruz
programme.desc: In this epic Western, two shady mercenaries (Gary Cooper, Burt Lancaster) in Mexico during the 1866 revolution are hired to escort a Countess and her gold to the Mexican army in Vera Cruz and find themselves at odds with the army…and each other!

programme.title: The Gunfight at Dodge City
programme.desc: Seeking a fresh start, Bat Masterson (Joel McCrea) rolls into Dodge City with a chip on his shoulder and a gun on his hip. But soon, his mysterious past will catch up with him when an old friend calls in a favor...one that might cost him his life!

programme.title: A Fistful Of Dynamite
programme.desc: The results are explosive when an Irish terrorist (James Coburn) with a dynamite obsession teams up with a Mexican peasant-turned-revolutionary (Rod Steiger) in this action-packed tale of power and politics. Directed by the legendary Sergio Leone.

programme.title: Dr. Who and the Daleks
programme.desc: Dr. Who accidently sends himself and his granddaughters to a mysterious planet, named Skaro.

programme.title: Dr. Who: Daleks' Invasion Earth 2150 A.D.
programme.desc: In the year 2150, the Earth is subjected to a ferocious Dalek invasion, bombarded with meteorites and cosmic rays. A brilliant scientist, Dr. Who, is transported into the future by a time and space machine. He arrives determined to destroy the Daleks…

programme.title: My Man Godfrey
programme.desc: A scatterbrained socialite hires a vagrant as a family butler...but there's more to Godfrey than meets the eye.

programme.title: Lilies of the Field
programme.desc: Nominated for 5 Academy Awards® including Best Picture and winner of the Best Actor Oscar® for Sidney Poitier for his role as an itinerant handyman who stops to help five impoverished nuns and the small Arizona desert town in which they reside.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Sidney Poitier and Rod Steiger (who won a Best Actor Oscar® for his performance) shine in this classic mystery-thriller that took home five Academy Awards®, including Best Picture and Best Adapted Screenplay. Lee Grant and Warren Oates also star.

programme.title: Attack
programme.desc: Eddie Albert is a cowardly captain, Lee Marvin a crooked colonel, and Jack Palance a diligent lieutenant as a small platoon fights its way back from the front in director Robert Aldrich's searing WWII drama.

programme.title: Ten Seconds to Hell
programme.desc: In this gritty WW II classic from director Robert Aldrich, Jeff Chandler and Jack Palance star as demolition experts who return to bombed-out Berlin to accept the very dangerous job of defusing unexploded bombs scattered throughout the city.

programme.title: The Best Years of Our Lives
programme.desc: Three World War II veterans return home to small-town America to discover that they and their families have been irreparably changed.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: By arranging a rendezvous between Klink and Burkhalter's sister, Hogan can slip out of camp and destroy a train.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: When one of Klink's old friends goes on his honeymoon, Hogan uses his car to get some radios to Paris.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan goes to the hospital to get information from a wounded contact.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: The Germans are sending Hogan to America demanding surrender along with another surprise.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan has a touchy mission to deliver ammunition to the underground.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: A glamorous English woman defects to the enemy and designs a super-effective aircraft defense system.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: An Italian officer helps Hogan photograph a new German anti-aircraft gun.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: For Colonel Hogan's birthday his crew decides to give him one ammunition dump freshly destroyed.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Newkirk hides a stolen German codebook in a dry well, Hogan must come up with a way to get it back.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Klink and Hogan's men together head to the Russian front on a suicide mission to steal some secret documents.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: A gas station has just been set up at Stalag 13 and Hogan plans to blow it up.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan uses Burkhalter's sister as a pawn to get back a captured Allied spy.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Squad announcement is bittersweet as some favorites go home. The team has their first appearance at the Star Ribbon cutting. Game Day is when dreams come true!

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Hundreds of beautiful and talented women converge on AT&T Stadium to start the hardest audition process in professional sports, trying out for a coveted spot on the most famous NFL cheerleading squad in the world, the Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: With the field narrowed down to 119 women, the pressure is on. They must quickly learn a power pom routine and the famous kickline in order to perform it an hour later before the judges.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The veterans finally enter the audition process. Now all 83 women are judged head to head during a panel interview, a solo dance performance and on their appearance on the football field as seen and the big screen.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: 44 women begin the very first training camp at the new 1 billion dollar Cowboys' facility, The Star. At the First Meeting, Kelli lays down the law and makes it clear that eight women will be sent home this summer.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: First, the ladies need to have the "classic look" of a Dallas Cowboys Cheerleader. Kelli's hair and make-up transformations are legendary. The ladies are also assessed through a new state of the art fitness test, "Styku".

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Kelli media trains the rookie candidates to determine who best represents the DCC at press events. NBC news anchor, Meredith Land tests their on-camera interview skills.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Personality is critical when representing the DCC brand. Kelli takes the women on location to see how they interact during a public appearance.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Katy Perry's choreographer, Nick Florez, stops by to offer some performance advice to the ladies. A day that each cheerleader never forgets. The first time they wear the DCC uniform to pose for their cameo photos.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The squad goes on an appearance to support pop music star, Demi Lovato. The ladies learn the entrance to the famed pre-game dance. It's a make or break moment. If a woman can't learn it quickly it might be her last night.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: With two suspended vets, the team must re-block their formations for their Hall Of Fame performance. New vets step up as a new point of the triangle is named. The rookie candidates try to get their footing during this never seen before rehearsal.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: 23 veterans travel to Canton, Ohio to perform at Jerry Jones' induction to the Pro Football Hall of Fame. All eyes are watching as the DCC perform for the NFL elite.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: As training camp winds down the pressure skyrockets. No one wants to be sent home now. The ladies start to crack under the pressure. Another one is sent home. Will this be the final cut?

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Kelli announces the official squad and the women realize the hard-fought dream of becoming a Dallas Cowboys Cheerleader. Full of excitement and nerves, the squad prepares for their very first football game at AT&T Stadium.

programme.title: Planet Dinosaur
programme.desc: A look at bizarre dinosaurs such as the curious buck-toothed Exipdexipteryx, the amazing four-winged Microraptor and the pot-bellied Nothronychus.

programme.title: Human Journey
programme.desc: Dr Alice Roberts visits the Arabian Desert to find clues as to how a tiny group left the African continent around 70,000 years ago.

programme.title: Human Journey
programme.desc: Dr Alice Roberts' journey continues into Asia in a quest to find out how early hunter-gatherers survived in the inhospitable Arctic region of Northern Siberia. Alice meets the nomadic Evenki people.

programme.title: Human Journey
programme.desc: Göbeklitepe ruins discovered in Turkey's history goes back 12,000 years. How and in what way did the descendants of the Neanderthals, the Aztecs of Europe, disappear with the arrival of Homo sapiens?

programme.title: Human Journey
programme.desc: Dr Alice Roberts looks at our ancestors' seemingly impossible journey to Australia. Miraculously preserved footprints and very old human fossils buried in the outback suggest a mystery: that humans reached Australia almost before anywhere else.

programme.title: Human Journey
programme.desc: How did Stone Age people reach North and South America? Dr Alice Roberts discovers evidence for an ancient corridor through the Canadian ice sheet that may have allowed those first people through.

programme.title: Lost Worlds: Vanished Lives
programme.desc: David travels the world to unravel some of the wonders and puzzles of palaeontology. But how do you find the world's oldest and rarest reptile?

programme.title: Lost Worlds: Vanished Lives
programme.desc: Could pterodactyls fly? And why did trilobites have such good eyes? David Attenborough investigates the secret lives of animals from the past, as told in the fossil record.

programme.title: Lost Worlds: Vanished Lives
programme.desc: David Attenborough uncovers dinosaur bones in the Sahara desert and visits the biggest, most spectacular dinosaur displays in the world.

programme.title: Lost Worlds: Vanished Lives
programme.desc: David Attenborough uncovers bizarre creatures of the earliest seas, tiny horses the size of spaniels and an animal that's half bird and half reptile - the rarest of them all.

programme.title: Horizon
programme.desc: A US law has been passed forcing the return of ethnic artefacts and ancestral remains to native communities.

programme.title: Walking with Monsters: Life Before Dinosaurs
programme.desc: The evolution of the predators who lived 550 million years ago, and how the first amphibians migrated from sea to land.

programme.title: Walking with Monsters: Life Before Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Three hundred million years ago, the forests were ruled by insects. This was a world in which giant dragonflies battled with two-foot-wide spiders.

programme.title: Walking with Monsters: Life Before Dinosaurs
programme.desc: On the supercontinent Pangea, early therapsids, creatures more similar to mammals than reptiles, fight for survival alongside other animals. In the carboniferous swamps, insects and arthropods take over and grow into giants.

programme.title: How to Build a Dinosaur
programme.desc: Dinosaurs died out 65 million years ago and we have hardly ever found a complete skeleton. So how do we turn a pile of broken bones into a dinosaur exhibit? Dr Alice Roberts finds out how the experts put skeletons back together.

programme.title: Science of Walking With Beasts
programme.desc: This episode explains how the 120-million-year reign of the dinosaurs ended when mammals became the fastest and fiercest creatures on the planet.

programme.desc: Nevada inmates learn how to train dogs to be adopted; an ex-show dog and his companion have a power struggle.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar helps an adopted terrier mix overcome her terrible fear of men and attempts to solve a pit bull's unhealthy fascination with chewing on rocks.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A beagle has a chewing problem; three German shepherds must be kept apart; a bichon frise dislikes her owner.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A Yorkie attacks his leash, plants and a fellow Yorkie; a bull terrier attacks larger dogs; a Jack Russell terrier/Italian greyhound mix barks constantly while her owner is at work.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar Milan's Dog Psychology Center in Los Angeles is both the home and refuge to nearly 50 dogs who are a resource in his work.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A couple's Chihuahua mix terrorizes their mastiff and dominates the house; a pit bull is not growing out of his puppy behavior.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: An aggressive English bulldog/Lab mix; a cocker spaniel with a life-threatening appetite for paper products.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A Labrador mix with dog aggression; a Jack Russell terrier and a Queensland heeler whose formerly cordial relationship has become hostile.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A Maltese hates being on his leash; an American Eskimo barks and circles strangers who enter the house; a Nova Scotia duck tolling retriever with a fear of pools.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar helps a pregnant Ashlee Simpson-Wentz's English bulldog with his aggression issues before the baby arrives; a retriever with food aggression.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: An aggressive sheepdog/collie mix needs extra attention, so Cesar brings him to the Dog Psychology Center; a St. Bernard with a fear of stairs.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A Great Dane behaves aggressively toward strange dogs; a Lhasa apso eats everything she can get her paws on.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A Chihuahua mix with aggression issues; a Pomeranian with severe separation anxiety; an Aussie/shar pei mix who runs away when his owner coughs.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
